@@ -1,3 +1,16 @@
+*   Fix AR Pool Reaper thread leak after `Parallelization#shutdown`.
+
+    After parallelized test runs, the parent process leaked the AR Pool Reaper
+    thread, holding open connection pools and file descriptors for up to
+    `reaping_frequency` seconds (or indefinitely if never reaped).
+
+    Three fixes: `Parallelization#shutdown` now calls `run_cleanup_hooks`;
+    AR registers a cleanup hook that discards all connection pools; and
